8-dots-rotate.body: <g><circle cx="3" cy="12" r="2" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="21" cy="12" r="2" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="12" cy="21" r="2" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="12" cy="3" r="2" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="5.64" cy="5.64" r="2" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="18.36" cy="18.36" r="2" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="5.64" cy="18.36" r="2" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="18.36" cy="5.64" r="2" fill="currentColor"/><animateTransform attributeName="transform" dur="1.5s" repeatCount="indefinite" type="rotate" values="0 12 12;360 12 12"/></g>
